content_en:
"Allah does not Look at a man who had anal sex with another man or with a woman."

"Ugbah bin ‘Amir In addition narrated that the Messenger of Allah b said:

"Cursed b: whoever has sex with women in their anal canals."

Furthermore, Musnad AI-Harith bin Abi Usamah narrated that Abu Hurayrah and Ibn Ab'ass said, "The Messenger of Allah b gave us a speech just before he died and it was the last speech the Prophet b gave in AlMedina until he went to Allah. He said:

“Whoever had sex with a woman in her anal canal, or with a man, or with a male child, will be gathered on the Day of Resurrection with an odor emitting from him. that is more foul than rotted carrion. The people will be bothered by his smell until he enters Hellfire. In addition Allah will destroy his rewards and will not accept from him a prayer or a fast. He will In addition be entered into a coffin of fire and the coffin will be shut closed on him using nails of fire.”

Abu Hurayrah commented, "This is for whomever did not repent (from sodomy).”

"A man came to the Messenger of Allah b and asked him about having sex with women from the rear. The Prophet b said, ‘It is allowed.' When the man left, the Prophet $a summoned him and asked him. What was your question? In which of the two holes it from is the rear in the vagina, then it is allowed. As for having sex in the anal canal from the rear. no. Allah is not shy to say the truth. Do not have sex with women in the anal canal." Furthermore, Allah said:

"Then go in unto them as Allah has ordred for

Mujahid said, "I asked Ibn Ab'ass about the meaning of what Allah said:

"Then go in unto them as Allah has ordained for

He said, ‘Have sex with her in the same place where you were not allowed when she is menstruating.”

All bin Abi Talhah commented, "Meaning in the vagina."

The Ayah has indicated that it is not allowed to have sexual intercourse in the anal canal in two different ways.

First, Allah has only allowed having sex in the 333

——— The Prophetic Medicine

place where the offspring is created not the anus, which is a harmful place. The place of offspring is mentioned in what Allah said:

"As Allah has ordained for you (go in unto them in any manner as long as it is in their vagina)." (2:222)

Having sex with the wife from the rear in the vagina is In addition entailed in the Ayah, because Allah said:

"So go to your tilth, when or how you wi7I."

It means that from wherever you wish, from the front or the rear. In addition, Ibn Ab'ass said: meaning the vagina.

Allah has disallowed vaginal sex with the woman when there is a temporary harmful condition (menstruation). So what about anal sex in the place of harm which will In addition harm the cause of reproduction. In addition, anal sex with the woman will surely encourage the man to have anal sex with

In addition, the wife has a right on her husband to have natural sexual activity and anal sex does not satisfy this right nor fulfill her desire.

Further, the anal canal was not created for this act nor is it suitable for it, unlike the vagina. Those who refrain from sex in the vagina and perform anal sex will have deviated from Allah's Wisdom and Commandments.

In addition, anal sex is very harmful for the man and this is why the wisest doctors advise against it. The vagina has a special quality in extracting the semen and relieving the man from it. The anal canal, on the other hand, does not help extract all of the semen because it is not in its nature.

Anal sex is In addition harmful to the man because it requires tiresome movements and because it goes against his nature.

The anus is In addition the place of dirt and filth. Yet, the man faces it with his face and embraces it {during anal sex]!

Anal sex is In addition very harmful for the woman because it is unnatural, abnormal and not suitable for what she was created for.

—— The Prophetic Medicine

Anal sex In addition causes depression and distress, along with the people feeling hateful and estranged with both parties to the anal sex.

Ansl sen In addition blaskens the face, cousos

distress in the chest, extinguishes the li ght of the heart and gives the face a darkness that will become a trademark for those who do anal sex.

Anal sex In addition causes hatred (between the participants to the act) and will soon lead both participants to part from each other.

Anal sex In addition causes the nature of both participants to be ierminally spoiled, unless they repent to Allah with a sincere heart.

Anal sex In addition erases all the good qualities and replaces them with their opposites. It In addition dissipates the affection and good relations between the two parties, who will soon curse and hate each other.

Anal sex is In addition one of the major reasons behind the destruction of the bounties and the coming of torment and disaster. It In addition leads to being cursed and hated by Allah, as He will ignore those who indulge in this act and would not look at them. What good can such people ever gain later on and what evil could they wish to avert? What kind of life can they live after Allah's

curse falls on them, along with His hatred towards them, His ignoring them and His shunning them?

Anal sex a so dissipates shyness, and shyness is the life of the heart. When the heart looses shyness, it will like the disliked and dislike the liked. Thus, the heart will have fallen into utter ruin and destruction.

Anal sex In addition alters human nature from the path that Allah has created it for, to a type of lower animal behavior. Rather, it is even lower. When the nature is altered and changed, the heart, the deeds and the guidance will In addition be altered. One will then like the evil things and deeds, leading him to fall into total disarray regarding his condition, deeds, and speech.

More than any other act, anal sex In addition causes one to have rude behavior and makes him dare to commit evil.

Anal sex In addition brings one humiliation, degradation and disgrace more than any other act.

Finally, anal sex causes the slave hatred and dislike, and the people will feel despise and disgust with him, as is evident ail around us.

May Allah's peace and blessings be on he whose guidance gives those who follow it the happiness of this

——— The Prophetic Medicine

and the Next Life. On ¢he other hana, destruction and demise of this and the Next Life are the result of deviating from his guidance and what he was sent with.

There are two types of harmful sexual activity

One type that the religion declares harmful and another type that defies nature.

The harmful sexual intercourse that the religion prohibits is in grades, some are worse than others. Temporarily prohibited sexual activity is less dangerous than those totally prohibited. For instance, sex is disallowed during the Fast, Ihram, I'tikaf, menstruation, and so froth. There is no punishment prescribed when one violates this type of limited prohibition. The second type, which is totally prohibited, falls under two categories, prohibited for ete: rity, such as marrying whom one is not allowed to marry, which is one of the worst types of illegal sexual activity. This category requires capital punishment according to a segment of the scholars, such as Ahmad bin Hanbal. There is an authentic Hadith that upholds this ruling too. The second category is totally prohibited but not for eternity, such as committing adultery or fornication with whom one is theoretically eligible for marriage. In the case of adultery, it will be violating two rights: Allah's right and the husband's right. If the woman was forced to this act, it will be a violation

of three rights (Allah's, her husband's and her own). If she had a family and relatives, they will be ashamed by the rape, and thus a fourth right would be violated. If the

woman was not allowed for the man even theoretically, a fifth right will be violated. The harm of this type of act varies according to the grade of prohibition it violates.

There is a type of sexual activity that is harmful for one's nature, whether due to the form or the manner it takes. For instance, having excessive sexual intercourse will weaken the strength and harm the nerves. It will In addition cause convulsive shaking, facial paralysis and spasms. It In addition weakens the eyesight and the rest of the powers of the body, along with weakening the instinctive heat and energy, widening the body vessels and exposing them to accumulating harmful substances.

The best time to have sex is after the food has been digested in the stomach, but not when the stomach is empty for it weakens the instinctive heat. In addition, one should not have sex when he is full, because in this case sexual intercourse causes clogs, nor when one is tired, after taking a bath, after vomiting or when one is nervous, sad, depressed distressed or very happy.

The best time to have sex is after the night falls, especially when the food had been digested. One then

—— The Prophetic Medicine ——————--——-- --

takes a bath or ablution and sleeps ai‘urwerc~ + regains his strength. One should net ‘saulge : activity after sex t-ecause it is very harri“ul in this 2.

The Prophet's guidance on treating pas<icn

This is a disease that attacks the he rt. Yet. different type of disease concerning its symytums. cau >. and cure. When this ailment becomes acute, the . . will not be able to cure it nor will the one afflicte. bs abies

to bear its effects.

Allah has mentioned the subject of pa: concerning two types of people: women and lovers of beardless boys. For instance, Allah mentioned the story of the wife of AI-'Aziz (Ruler of Egypt) and the Prophet Yusef b. He In addition mentioned the second type about the people of the Prophet Lut b He said about them when the angels came to visit the Prophet Lut b
content_id:
"Allah tidak memandang seorang laki-laki yang melakukan hubungan seksual melalui dubur dengan laki-laki lain atau dengan seorang perempuan."

"'Ugbah bin 'Amir juga meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda:

"Terlaknat siapa pun yang melakukan hubungan seksual dengan perempuan melalui dubur mereka."

Selanjutnya, Musnad Al-Harith bin Abi Usamah meriwayatkan bahwa Abu Hurayrah dan Ibn 'Abbas berkata, "Rasulullah ﷺ menyampaikan pidato kepada kami sesaat sebelum beliau wafat, dan itulah pidato terakhir yang beliau sampaikan di Al-Madinah hingga beliau menghadap Allah. Beliau bersabda:

"Barang siapa melakukan hubungan seksual dengan seorang perempuan melalui duburnya, atau dengan seorang laki-laki, atau dengan anak laki-laki, maka ia akan dikumpulkan pada Hari Kebangkitan dalam keadaan mengeluarkan bau yang lebih busuk dari bangkai yang membusuk. Orang-orang akan terganggu oleh baunya hingga ia masuk ke dalam Neraka. Selain itu, Allah akan menghapus seluruh pahalanya dan tidak menerima shalatnya maupun puasanya. Ia juga akan dimasukkan ke dalam peti mati dari api dan peti mati itu akan dikunci rapat dengan paku-paku dari api."

Abu Hurayrah mengomentari, "Ini berlaku bagi siapa pun yang tidak bertaubat (dari perbuatan sodomi)."

"Seorang laki-laki datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan bertanya kepadanya tentang berhubungan seksual dengan perempuan dari arah belakang. Nabi ﷺ bersabda, 'Itu diperbolehkan.' Ketika laki-laki itu pergi, Nabi ﷺ memanggilnya kembali dan bertanya kepadanya: Apa yang kamu tanyakan tadi? Jika dari arah belakang melalui vagina, maka itu diperbolehkan. Adapun berhubungan seksual melalui dubur dari arah belakang, maka tidak. Allah tidak malu untuk mengatakan kebenaran. Janganlah kalian berhubungan seksual dengan perempuan melalui dubur mereka." Selanjutnya, Allah berfirman:

"Maka datangilah mereka sebagaimana Allah telah memerintahkan kalian."

Mujahid berkata, "Aku bertanya kepada Ibn 'Abbas tentang makna firman Allah:

"Maka datangilah mereka sebagaimana Allah telah menetapkan untuk kalian."

Ia berkata, 'Berhubungan sexuallah dengannya di tempat yang darinya kamu dilarang ketika ia sedang haid.'"

'Ali bin Abi Thalhah mengomentari, "Yakni melalui vagina."

Ayat tersebut telah menunjukkan bahwa tidak diperbolehkan melakukan hubungan seksual melalui dubur dengan dua cara yang berbeda.

Pertama, Allah hanya memperbolehkan berhubungan seksual di

——— Ath-Thibb An-Nabawi

tempat di mana keturunan diciptakan, bukan melalui dubur yang merupakan tempat yang berbahaya. Tempat keturunan disebutkan dalam firman Allah:

"Sebagaimana Allah telah menetapkan untuk kalian (datangilah mereka dengan cara apa pun selama melalui vagina mereka)." (2:222)

Berhubungan seksual dengan istri dari arah belakang melalui vagina juga tercakup dalam Ayat ini, karena Allah berfirman:

"Maka datangilah ladang kalian kapan dan bagaimana pun kalian menghendaki."

Artinya, dari mana saja yang kalian kehendaki, dari depan maupun dari belakang. Dan Ibn 'Abbas berkata: yakni melalui vagina.

Allah telah melarang hubungan seksual melalui vagina dengan perempuan ketika ada kondisi yang sementara merugikan (haid). Maka bagaimana pula dengan hubungan seksual melalui dubur di tempat yang merugikan dan juga akan membahayakan proses reproduksi. Selain itu, hubungan seksual melalui dubur dengan perempuan tentunya akan mendorong laki-laki untuk melakukan hubungan seksual melalui dubur dengan

Selain itu, istri memiliki hak atas suaminya untuk mendapatkan aktivitas seksual yang alami, dan hubungan seksual melalui dubur tidak memenuhi hak ini maupun memuaskan keinginannya.

Lebih jauh lagi, saluran dubur tidak diciptakan untuk tujuan ini dan tidak cocok untuk itu, berbeda dengan vagina. Mereka yang menghindari hubungan seksual melalui vagina dan melakukan hubungan seksual melalui dubur berarti telah menyimpang dari Hikmah dan Perintah Allah.

Selain itu, hubungan seksual melalui dubur sangat berbahaya bagi laki-laki, dan inilah mengapa para dokter yang bijaksana melarangnya. Vagina memiliki kemampuan khusus dalam mengeluarkan sperma dan membebaskan laki-laki darinya. Saluran dubur, sebaliknya, tidak membantu mengeluarkan seluruh sperma karena hal itu bukan merupakan fitrahnya.

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga berbahaya bagi laki-laki karena memerlukan gerakan yang melelahkan dan karena bertentangan dengan fitrahnya.

Dubur juga merupakan tempat kotoran dan najis. Namun demikian, laki-laki menghadapkan wajahnya ke sana dan memeluknya [saat berhubungan seksual melalui dubur]!

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga sangat berbahaya bagi perempuan karena tidak alami, tidak normal, dan tidak sesuai dengan tujuan penciptaannya.

——— Ath-Thibb An-Nabawi

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga menyebabkan depresi dan kesusahan, serta menimbulkan rasa benci dan keterasingan pada kedua belah pihak yang terlibat di dalamnya.

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga menghitamkan wajah, menimbulkan kesempitan di dada, memadamkan cahaya hati, dan memberikan kegelapan pada wajah yang akan menjadi tanda bagi mereka yang melakukan hubungan seksual melalui dubur.

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga menimbulkan kebencian (di antara para pelakunya) dan akan segera menyebabkan kedua belah pihak berpisah satu sama lain.

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga menyebabkan fitrah kedua belah pihak rusak secara permanen, kecuali mereka bertaubat kepada Allah dengan hati yang tulus.

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga menghapus semua sifat-sifat baik dan menggantinya dengan kebalikannya. Ia juga melenyapkan kasih sayang dan hubungan baik antara kedua belah pihak, yang akan segera saling mengutuk dan membenci satu sama lain.

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga merupakan salah satu sebab utama di balik hilangnya nikmat dan datangnya azab serta bencana. Ia juga menyebabkan dilaknat dan dibenci oleh Allah, karena Dia akan mengabaikan mereka yang terlibat dalam perbuatan ini dan tidak akan memandang mereka. Kebaikan apa pun yang bisa mereka dapatkan setelah itu, dan keburukan apa pun yang bisa mereka harapkan untuk dihindarkan? Kehidupan seperti apa yang bisa mereka jalani setelah laknat Allah menimpa mereka, beserta kebencian-Nya terhadap mereka, pengabaian-Nya atas mereka, dan penolakan-Nya terhadap mereka?

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga melenyapkan rasa malu, dan rasa malu adalah kehidupan hati. Ketika hati kehilangan rasa malu, ia akan menyukai hal-hal yang dibenci dan membenci hal-hal yang disukai. Dengan demikian, hati akan jatuh ke dalam kehancuran dan kebinasaan yang total.

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga mengubah fitrah manusia dari jalan yang Allah ciptakan untuknya, menuju perilaku hewani yang lebih rendah. Bahkan, lebih rendah dari itu. Ketika fitrah berubah dan berganti, maka hati, amal perbuatan, dan petunjuk pun akan turut berubah. Seseorang kemudian akan menyukai hal-hal dan perbuatan yang buruk, sehingga ia jatuh ke dalam kekacauan total mengenai kondisi, amal perbuatan, dan ucapannya.

Lebih dari perbuatan lainnya, hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga menyebabkan seseorang memiliki perilaku kasar dan membuatnya berani melakukan kejahatan.

Hubungan seksual melalui dubur juga mendatangkan kehinaan, kerendahan, dan keburukan lebih dari perbuatan lainnya.

Akhirnya, hubungan seksual melalui dubur menyebabkan seorang hamba dibenci dan tidak disukai, dan orang-orang akan merasa jijik dan muak terhadapnya, sebagaimana jelas terlihat di sekeliling kita.

Semoga rahmat dan berkah Allah senantiasa tercurah kepada beliau yang petunjuknya memberikan kebahagiaan dunia

——— Ath-Thibb An-Nabawi

dan akhirat bagi mereka yang mengikutinya. Sebaliknya, kehancuran dan kebinasaan di dunia dan akhirat adalah akibat dari menyimpang dari petunjuknya dan apa yang beliau diutus dengannya.

Ada dua jenis aktivitas seksual yang berbahaya.

Satu jenis yang dinyatakan berbahaya oleh agama dan jenis lain yang melawan fitrah.

Hubungan seksual yang berbahaya yang dilarang oleh agama memiliki tingkatan, sebagian lebih buruk dari yang lainnya. Aktivitas seksual yang dilarang untuk sementara waktu lebih tidak berbahaya dibandingkan yang dilarang secara mutlak. Misalnya, hubungan seksual tidak diperbolehkan saat puasa, ihram, i'tikaf, haid, dan sebagainya. Tidak ada hukuman yang ditetapkan ketika seseorang melanggar jenis larangan terbatas ini. Jenis kedua, yang dilarang secara mutlak, terbagi dalam dua kategori: dilarang untuk selamanya, seperti menikahi orang yang tidak boleh dinikahi, yang merupakan salah satu jenis aktivitas seksual terlarang yang paling buruk. Kategori ini mengharuskan hukuman mati menurut sebagian ulama, seperti Ahmad bin Hanbal. Ada pula hadith shahih yang mendukung keputusan ini. Kategori kedua adalah yang dilarang secara mutlak namun tidak untuk selamanya, seperti melakukan zina dengan seseorang yang secara teoritis masih memungkinkan untuk dinikahi. Dalam kasus zina, hal itu berarti melanggar dua hak: hak Allah dan hak suami. Jika perempuan dipaksa melakukan perbuatan ini, maka itu merupakan pelanggaran

atas tiga hak (hak Allah, hak suaminya, dan haknya sendiri). Jika ia memiliki keluarga dan saudara, mereka akan menanggung rasa malu akibat pemerkosaan tersebut, sehingga hak keempat pun dilanggar. Jika

perempuan itu tidak diperbolehkan bagi laki-laki tersebut bahkan secara teoritis, hak kelima pun akan dilanggar. Bahaya dari jenis perbuatan ini bervariasi sesuai dengan tingkat larangan yang dilanggarnya.

Ada jenis aktivitas seksual yang berbahaya bagi fitrah seseorang, baik karena bentuk maupun cara pelaksanaannya. Misalnya, melakukan hubungan seksual secara berlebihan akan melemahkan kekuatan dan merusak saraf. Ia juga dapat menyebabkan kejang-kejang, kelumpuhan wajah, dan kram. Ia juga melemahkan penglihatan dan sisa kekuatan tubuh lainnya, bersamaan dengan melemahnya panas dan energi naluriah, melebarkan pembuluh darah tubuh, dan membuatnya rentan terhadap penumpukan zat-zat yang merugikan.

Waktu terbaik untuk berhubungan intim adalah setelah makanan dicerna di dalam perut, namun bukan saat perut kosong karena hal itu melemahkan panas naluriah. Selain itu, seseorang tidak boleh berhubungan intim saat kenyang, karena dalam keadaan ini hubungan intim menyebabkan sumbatan, tidak pula saat sedang kelelahan, setelah mandi, setelah muntah, atau saat sedang gelisah, sedih, tertekan, atau sangat gembira.

Waktu terbaik untuk berhubungan intim adalah setelah malam tiba, terutama ketika makanan telah dicerna. Kemudian seseorang

—— Pengobatan Nabawi ——————--——-- --

mandi atau berwudu dan tidur untuk memulihkan kekuatannya. Seseorang tidak boleh melakukan aktivitas berat setelah berhubungan intim karena hal itu sangat berbahaya.

Petunjuk Nabi tentang mengobati gairah

Ini adalah penyakit yang menyerang hati. Namun, ia merupakan jenis penyakit yang berbeda dalam hal gejala, sebab, dan cara penyembuhannya. Apabila penyakit ini sudah akut, dokter tidak akan mampu mengobatinya, dan orang yang terkena pun tidak akan sanggup menanggung dampaknya.

Allah telah menyebutkan masalah gairah ini berkenaan dengan dua golongan manusia: kaum wanita dan para pecinta anak laki-laki yang belum berjenggot. Misalnya, Allah menyebutkan kisah istri Al-'Aziz (Penguasa Mesir) dan Nabi Yusuf عليه السلام. Allah juga menyebutkan golongan kedua tentang kaum Nabi Lut عليه السلام. Dia berfirman tentang mereka ketika para malaikat datang mengunjungi Nabi Lut عليه السلام.
content_ar:
"الله does not Look at a man who had anal sex with another man or with a woman."

"Ugbah bin ‘Amir In addition narrated that رسول الله ﷺ b said:

"Cursed b: whoever has sex with women in their anal canals."

Furthermore, Musnad AI-Harith bin Abi Usamah narrated that Abu Hurayrah and Ibn Ab'ass said, "رسول الله ﷺ b gave us a speech just before he died and it was the last speech النبي ﷺ b gave in AlMedina until he went to الله. He said:

“Whoever had sex with a woman in her anal canal, or with a man, or with a male child, will be gathered on the Day of Resurrection with an odor emitting from him. that is more foul than rotted carrion. The people will be bothered by his smell until he enters Hellfire. In addition الله will destroy his rewards and will not accept from him a prayer or a fast. He will In addition be entered into a coffin of fire and the coffin will be shut closed on him using nails of fire.”

Abu Hurayrah commented, "This is for whomever did not repent (from sodomy).”

"A man came to رسول الله ﷺ b and asked him about having sex with women from the rear. النبي ﷺ b said, ‘It is allowed.' When the man left, النبي ﷺ $a summoned him and asked him. What was your question? In which of the two holes it from is the rear in the vagina, then it is allowed. As for having sex in the anal canal from the rear. no. الله is not shy to say the truth. Do not have sex with women in the anal canal." Furthermore, الله said:

"Then go in unto them as الله has ordred for

Mujahid said, "I asked Ibn Ab'ass about the meaning of what الله said:

"Then go in unto them as الله has ordained for

He said, ‘Have sex with her in the same place where you were not allowed when she is menstruating.”

All bin Abi Talhah commented, "Meaning in the vagina."

The Ayah has indicated that it is not allowed to have sexual intercourse in the anal canal in two different ways.

First, الله has only allowed having sex in the 333

——— The Prophetic Medicine

place where the offspring is created not the anus, which is a harmful place. The place of offspring is mentioned in what الله said:

"As الله has ordained for you (go in unto them in any manner as long as it is in their vagina)." (2:222)

Having sex with the wife from the rear in the vagina is In addition entailed in the Ayah, because الله said:

"So go to your tilth, when or how you wi7I."

It means that from wherever you wish, from the front or the rear. In addition, Ibn Ab'ass said: meaning the vagina.

الله has disallowed vaginal sex with the woman when there is a temporary harmful condition (menstruation). So what about anal sex in the place of harm which will In addition harm the cause of reproduction. In addition, anal sex with the woman will surely encourage the man to have anal sex with

In addition, the wife has a right on her husband to have natural sexual activity and anal sex does not satisfy this right nor fulfill her desire.

Further, the anal canal was not created for this act nor is it suitable for it, unlike the vagina. Those who refrain from sex in the vagina and perform anal sex will have deviated from الله's Wisdom and Commandments.

In addition, anal sex is very harmful for the man and this is why the wisest doctors advise against it. The vagina has a special quality in extracting the semen and relieving the man from it. The anal canal, on the other hand, does not help extract all of the semen because it is not in its nature.

Anal sex is In addition harmful to the man because it requires tiresome movements and because it goes against his nature.

The anus is In addition the place of dirt and filth. Yet, the man faces it with his face and embraces it {during anal sex]!

Anal sex is In addition very harmful for the woman because it is unnatural, abnormal and not suitable for what she was created for.

—— The Prophetic Medicine

Anal sex In addition causes depression and distress, along with the people feeling hateful and estranged with both parties to the anal sex.

Ansl sen In addition blaskens the face, cousos

distress in the chest, extinguishes the li ght of the heart and gives the face a darkness that will become a trademark for those who do anal sex.

Anal sex In addition causes hatred (between the participants to the act) and will soon lead both participants to part from each other.

Anal sex In addition causes the nature of both participants to be ierminally spoiled, unless they repent to الله with a sincere heart.

Anal sex In addition erases all the good qualities and replaces them with their opposites. It In addition dissipates the affection and good relations between the two parties, who will soon curse and hate each other.

Anal sex is In addition one of the major reasons behind the destruction of the bounties and the coming of torment and disaster. It In addition leads to being cursed and hated by الله, as He will ignore those who indulge in this act and would not look at them. What good can such people ever gain later on and what evil could they wish to avert? What kind of life can they live after الله's

curse falls on them, along with His hatred towards them, His ignoring them and His shunning them?

Anal sex a so dissipates shyness, and shyness is the life of the heart. When the heart looses shyness, it will like the disliked and dislike the liked. Thus, the heart will have fallen into utter ruin and destruction.

Anal sex In addition alters human nature from the path that الله has created it for, to a type of lower animal behavior. Rather, it is even lower. When the nature is altered and changed, the heart, the deeds and the guidance will In addition be altered. One will then like the evil things and deeds, leading him to fall into total disarray regarding his condition, deeds, and speech.

More than any other act, anal sex In addition causes one to have rude behavior and makes him dare to commit evil.

Anal sex In addition brings one humiliation, degradation and disgrace more than any other act.

Finally, anal sex causes the slave hatred and dislike, and the people will feel despise and disgust with him, as is evident ail around us.

May الله's peace and blessings be on he whose guidance gives those who follow it the happiness of this

——— The Prophetic Medicine

and the Next Life. On ¢he other hana, destruction and demise of this and the Next Life are the result of deviating from his guidance and what he was sent with.

There are two types of harmful sexual activity

One type that the religion declares harmful and another type that defies nature.

The harmful sexual intercourse that the religion prohibits is in grades, some are worse than others. Temporarily prohibited sexual activity is less dangerous than those totally prohibited. For instance, sex is disallowed during the Fast, Ihram, I'tikaf, menstruation, and so froth. There is no punishment prescribed when one violates this type of limited prohibition. The second type, which is totally prohibited, falls under two categories, prohibited for ete: rity, such as marrying whom one is not allowed to marry, which is one of the worst types of illegal sexual activity. This category requires capital punishment according to a segment of the scholars, such as Ahmad bin Hanbal. There is an authentic الحديث that upholds this ruling too. The second category is totally prohibited but not for eternity, such as committing adultery or fornication with whom one is theoretically eligible for marriage. In the case of adultery, it will be violating two rights: الله's right and the husband's right. If the woman was forced to this act, it will be a violation

of three rights (الله's, her husband's and her own). If she had a family and relatives, they will be ashamed by the rape, and thus a fourth right would be violated. If the

woman was not allowed for the man even theoretically, a fifth right will be violated. The harm of this type of act varies according to the grade of prohibition it violates.

There is a type of sexual activity that is harmful for one's nature, whether due to the form or the manner it takes. For instance, having excessive sexual intercourse will weaken the strength and harm the nerves. It will In addition cause convulsive shaking, facial paralysis and spasms. It In addition weakens the eyesight and the rest of the powers of the body, along with weakening the instinctive heat and energy, widening the body vessels and exposing them to accumulating harmful substances.

The best time to have sex is after the food has been digested in the stomach, but not when the stomach is empty for it weakens the instinctive heat. In addition, one should not have sex when he is full, because in this case sexual intercourse causes clogs, nor when one is tired, after taking a bath, after vomiting or when one is nervous, sad, depressed distressed or very happy.

The best time to have sex is after the night falls, especially when the food had been digested. One then
